ops.body: Shipped as cc-guides v0.1.16 (commit fb2bd91, 2026-07-11). Net -3300 LOC: renderV1 + v1compat.go (incl. the v1-only transition default), migrate/init commands + internal/migrate + internal/legacy packages, the {{>}} directive machinery (guide/parse.go, render.go, resolver.go, dirresolver.go), and the legacy banner half of guide/banner.go (renamed marker.go) all deleted; check is lock-only (errNoLock invalid-input for missing lock OR lock entry); action.yml + re-render.yml lock-only with the adoption message and the byte-identical pipefail-safe skip rule. Two codex review rounds: round 1 → 6 actionable stale-comment/test findings fixed (incl. restored TestCheckPartialLockPerArtifact + new legacy-banner-refused boundary test); round 2 re-ran the failed action/workflow lens with 2 independent lanes → zero findings, plus manual diff eyeball. Gates green (test -race, vet, golangci-lint). action-v1 advanced to fb2bd91; live-verified: slop-cop Guides check re-run green under the new action, cc-review + cookiesync re-render dispatches installed 0.1.16 and hit the lock-only skip ("only the lock's version/pins moved") with no commits.
